description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Stability Capital Buffer is the surplus of the Sky Protocol that
is able to be the final absorber
unsuccessful liquidation of failed Prime Agents. See [A.3.5.1 - Surplus Buffer](9782cdc5-c274-45c2-bf4a-690f22c6a294).

The Stability Capital Buffer is the surplus of the Sky Protocol that absorbs losses from unsuccessful liquidation of failed Prime Agents. See [A.3.5.1 - Surplus Buffer](9782cdc5-c274-45c2-bf4a-690f22c6a294).
summary: Clarify Genesis Capital Backstop Haircut And Settlement
description: Clarifies the haircut cap as Aggregate Backstop Capital and removes the 24 billion SKY distribution to Genesis Agents when the haircut fully covers the loss.
